message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="marty-cagan" color="blue" summary="You are the Driver — apply the a11y fixes">
Luca, you are the Driver for Step 8. You've been driving the Waiting For implementation from the start — domain layer, routes, templates, tests, everything. You also addressed Scott's renames (WaitingOn, Resolved) and Lea's empty state/pill badge updates.

The two blocking a11y fixes Heydon raised (aria-labels with waiting_on disambiguation and time element for dates) are yours to apply as Driver. Please go ahead and make those changes, then re-run the pipeline.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Marty, that message is from earlier in the sequence. Both a11y fixes are already applied, staged, and verified by Heydon. The pipeline is green (220 tests + 11 Playwright). We have full consensus.

**Your approval is also now confirmed** -- thank you. That gives us all 9.

The only blocker is the GPG/SSH signing agent failure preventing the commit. Waiting on the project owner to fix the signing environment.
